creator: jpb@jimby.name
text:
Copy-n-paste is common enough that its paths to errors are well known.
These include caveats like the one in comment 0, but also include end-of-line issues, unicode issues, and others.

$ ~/doc/documentation/content/en]$ rg   --sort path "fetch ht" * | grep -i freebsd | grep -v patch | wc
      10      44    1574

and most occur in the jails and virtualization chapters.

Perhaps a warning is better in both those chapters.
